Your best friend in production.

Product Engineer [Assignment mandatory]
₹1.7M - ₹2.1M INR•0.01% - 0.10%•Bengaluru, KA, IN / Bengaluru, Karnataka, IN
Job type
Full-time

Role
Engineering, Full stack

Experience
1+ years

Visa
US citizenship/visa not required

Skills
JavaScript, Python, TypeScript

Connect directly with founders of the best YC-funded startups.
Apply to role ›

About the role
About the interview

• Assignment as per this doc - mandatory

• Interview with CTO

• Interview with Engineer

• Result

Expect all of this in less than 7 days from the date of assignment submission.

About DrDroid
What we do

DrDroid is building AI Agents for Platform & Infrastructure teams.
We help engineering teams fix issues faster and reduce escalations during on-call—automating triage, debugging, and remediation.

We’re also the team behind several open-source projects:
🔹 Playbooks – A runbook automation platform
🔹 Kenobi – An event analytics platform for debugging data pipelines

Join us in redefining how teams run operations in the post-GPT world.

Vision

Think if anyone in the team can debug an average production issue without requiring to involve a senior engineer (or a team of engineers?). Wouldn't that be wonderful? That's what we are working towards.

Funding

To work towards our vision, we couldn’t have been more grateful for having some amazing investors. We are lucky enough to be supported by Accel and we were part of Y-Combinator’s W23 batch.

In case you are interested to know more about the team, check this page. If you're passionate about building tools to improve lives of other developers, we might be a good fit.
